zh.Euston, Suffolk, England: 英國英格蘭素福爾可艾尤斯頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger Rookwood於大約1450年出生在英國素福爾可艾尤斯頓時，他的父親Roger Rookwood24歲，母親Alice Doggett22歲。他於大約1478年與Mrs. Elizabeth Rookwood在英國英格蘭素福爾可結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1502年在他的家鄉享年53歲，埋葬在英國素福爾可艾尤斯頓。

zh-hans.Euston, Suffolk, England: 英国英格兰素福爾可艾尤斯頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger Rookwood于大约1450年出生在英国素福爾可艾尤斯頓时，他的父亲Roger Rookwood24岁，母亲Alice Doggett22岁。他于大约1478年与Mrs. Elizabeth Rookwood在英国英格兰素福爾可结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1502年在他的家乡享年53岁，埋葬在英国素福爾可艾尤斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Rookwood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of various places in Essex and Sussex named in Middle English with rok(e) ‘rook’ + wod(e) ‘wood’ (Old English hrōc, wudu).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger Rookwood was born about 1450, in Euston, Suffolk, England, his father, Roger Rookwood, was 24 and his mother, Alice Doggett, was 22. He married Mrs. Elizabeth Rookwood about 1478, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1502, in his hometown, at the age of 53, and was buried in Euston, Suffolk, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger Rookwood est né environ 1450, à Euston, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Roger Rookwood, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Alice Doggett, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Elizabeth Rookwood environ 1478, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1502, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Euston, Suffolk, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger Rookwood um 1450 in Euston, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Rookwood 24 und seine Mutter Alice Doggett 22. Er hat um 1478 in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom Mrs. Elizabeth Rookwood geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1502 im Alter von 53 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Euston, Suffolk, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Rookwood è nato il circa 1450 nel Euston, Suffolk, England, il suo padre, Roger Rookwood, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Alice Doggett, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Elizabeth Rookwood circa 1478, nel Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1502, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Euston, Suffolk, England.

ja.Euston, Suffolk, England: イギリスイギリススフォルクエウストン
ja.Suffolk, England: イギリスイギリススフォルク
ja.Fishley, Norfolk, England: イギリスノーフォルクフィシュリー
ja.lifeSummary: Roger Rookwoodが約1450年にイギリススフォルクエウストンで生まれた時，父Roger Rookwoodは24歳，母Alice Doggettは22歳であった。約1478年にイギリスイギリススフォルクでMrs. Elizabeth Rookwoodと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1502年に故郷で53歳で死去し，イギリススフォルクエウストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Rookwood(이)가 대략 1450년 영국 수폴크 우스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Rookwood(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Alice Doggett(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1478년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 Mrs. Elizabeth Rookwood(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1502년 그의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수폴크 우스턴에 묻혔다.

mn.Euston, Suffolk, England: Euston, Sudfole, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger Rookwood nasceu aproximadamente 1450, em Euston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Rookwood, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Alice Doggett, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Elizabeth Rookwood aproximadamente 1478, em Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1502, em sua cidade natal, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Euston, Suffolk, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger Rookwood родился около 1450 г. в местности эустон, суффолк, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Rookwood было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Alice Doggett, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Elizabeth Rookwood около 1478 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1502 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности эустон, суффолк, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger Rookwood nació aproximadamente 1450, en Euston, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Rookwood, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Alice Doggett, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Mrs. Elizabeth Rookwood aproximadamente 1478, en Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1502, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Euston, Suffolk, Inglaterra.
